parameters.name: get_pois_by_criteria
parameters.description: Search permanent Points of Interest in Germany: restaurants, museums, castles, wineries, landmarks, parks etc. Use for places that exist year-round. Do NOT use for time-bound events. Note: Restaurant data sparse for major cities — use postal_code or near_point instead of locality. Parameters: name (POI name), keywords (comma-separated, e.g. 'art,history'), type (schema.org type e.g. Museum, Restaurant, TouristAttraction, LandmarksOrHistoricalBuildings, FoodEstablishment), locality (city — unreliable for major cities), region (e.g. Schwarzwald, Bayern), postal_code, near_point (format: 'km,lat,lon' e.g. '10km,48.137,11.576')

value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'Specific POI name to search for', 'string') }}
value.type: ={{ $fromAI('type', 'Schema.org type: Museum, Restaurant, TouristAttraction, LandmarksOrHistoricalBuildings, FoodEstablishment, Winery, Park', 'string') }}
value.locality: ={{ $fromAI('locality', 'City or town name (unreliable for major cities, use postal_code instead)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_events_by_criteria
parameters.description: Search upcoming tourist events and cultural activities in Germany (festivals, food markets, guided tours, wine tastings). Use for time-bound events. Do NOT use for permanent POIs. Note: locality filter unreliable for major cities — omit and use region instead. Parameters: keywords (REQUIRED, comma-separated German or English, e.g. 'Kulinarik,Food', 'Wein,Weinprobe', 'Musik,Konzert'), dateRangeStart (REQUIRED, YYYY-MM-DD, today or future), name (event name), locality (city), dateRangeEnd (YYYY-MM-DD), region (e.g. Bayern, Pfalz)

value.keywords: ={{ $fromAI('keywords', 'Comma-separated event keywords (REQUIRED), e.g. Kulinarik,Food or Musik,Konzert', 'string') }}
value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'Event name to search for', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_trails_by_criteria
parameters.description: Search hiking trails, cycling routes and walking tours in Germany. Returns routes with distance, difficulty and waypoints. By default only circular routes are returned. Set is_circular to false for all trail types. Parameters: name (trail name), keywords (e.g. 'downhill,lake view'), difficulty (exactly: Leicht, Mittel, or Schwer), max_length_km (number), region (e.g. Schwarzwald, Eifel), is_circular (true/false, default true), near_point (format: 'km,lat,lon')

parameters.name: get_entity_details
parameters.description: Get full details for a tourism entity by URI. Use a URI from a previous get_pois_by_criteria, get_events_by_criteria, or get_trails_by_criteria result. Parameters: uri (REQUIRED, the entity URI), language (two-letter code, default 'de')

value.uri: ={{ $fromAI('uri', 'Entity URI from a previous search result (REQUIRED)', 'string') }}
